zh.lifeSummary: 當Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent於大約1169年出生在英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯時，他的父親Walter de Burgh37歲，母親Alice de Bourgogne28歲。他於大約1211年與Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1206年住在英國肯特。他於1189年登記服兵役。他於1227年被列為appointed governor of rochester castle。他去世於1243年5月12日在英國素瑞班斯亞德享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦卡姆登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent于大约1169年出生在英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯时，他的父亲Walter de Burgh37岁，母亲Alice de Bourgogne28岁。他于大约1211年与Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1206年住在英国肯特。他于1189年登记服兵役。他于1227年被列为appointed governor of rochester castle。他去世于1243年5月12日在英国素瑞班斯亞德享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦卡姆登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).
German: variant of   Burk  .

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
South German: variant of   Buri  .

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: English:

topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Hubert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was popular among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain, where it was later reinforced by settlers from the Low Countries. An 8th-century St Hubert succeeded St Lambert as bishop of Maastricht and is regarded as the patron of hunters, since, like St Eustace , he is supposed to have seen a vision of Christ crucified between the antlers of a stag.

variants.name: Hupprecht
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was popular among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain, where it was later reinforced by settlers from the Low Countries. An 8th-century St Hubert succeeded St Lambert as bishop of Maastricht and is regarded as the patron of hunters, since, like St Eustace , he is supposed to have seen a vision of Christ crucified between the antlers of a stag.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent was born about 1169, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, his father, Walter de Burgh, was 37 and his mother, Alice de Bourgogne, was 28. He married Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay about 1211, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Kent, England in 1206. He registered for military service in 1189. In 1227, at the age of 59, his occupation is listed as appointed governor of rochester castle. He died on 12 May 1243, in Banstead, Surrey, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Camden, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent est né environ 1169, à Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Burgh, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice de Bourgogne, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay environ 1211, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Kent, Angleterre en 1206. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. En 1227, à l’âge de 59 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed governor of rochester castle. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1243, à Banstead, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Camden, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent um 1169 in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Burgh 37 und seine Mutter Alice de Bourgogne 28. Er hat um 1211 in England Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1206 hat er in Kent, England gelebt. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1227, als er 59 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als appointed governor of rochester castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Mai 1243 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Banstead, Surrey, England und wurde in Camden, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent è nato il circa 1169 nel Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Walter de Burgh, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Bourgogne, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay circa 1211, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Kent, England nel 1206. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Nel 1227, all'età di 59 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed governor of rochester castle. Morì il 12 maggio 1243, nel Banstead, Surrey, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Camden, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kentが約1169年にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスで生まれた時，父Walter de Burghは37歳，母Alice de Bourgogneは28歳であった。約1211年にイギリスでBeatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1206年にはイギリスケントに住んでいた。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。1227年，59歳の時，職業はappointed governor of rochester castleと記録されている。彼は1243年5月12日にイギリススリーバンステアドで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンカムデンにて埋葬された。

ko.Burgh Next Aylsham, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 버그h 니스트 아이샤
ko.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 뉴턴 세인트 파이스
ko.lifeSummary: Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent(이)가 대략 1169년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Burgh(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Bourgogne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1211년 영국에서 Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1206년도에 영국 켄트에서 살았다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1227년, 59세의 나이로 그의 직업은 appointed governor of rochester castle이었다. 그는 1243년 5월 12일 영국 수리 반스테아드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 캄든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent nasceu aproximadamente 1169, em Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Burgh, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Bourgogne, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay aproximadamente 1211, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Kent, Inglaterra em 1206. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Em 1227, com 59 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed governor of rochester castle. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1243, em Banstead, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Camden, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Burgh Next Aylsham, Norfolk, England: бург некст аилшам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: нютон сеинт феит, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent родился около 1169 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Burgh было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bourgogne, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay около 1211 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности кэнт, Англия в 1206 году. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1227 году, в возрасте 59 лет, работал по профессии appointed governor of rochester castle. Он умер 12 мая 1243 г. в местности банстид, сурри, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности камден, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hubert de Burgh 1st Earl of Kent nació aproximadamente 1169, en Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Burgh, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice de Bourgogne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay aproximadamente 1211, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Kent, Inglaterra en 1206. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. En 1227, a la edad de 59 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed governor of rochester castle. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1243, en Banstead, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Camden, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
